name: Tomato Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop very ripe tomatoes into small pieces, about the size of a thumbnail.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Beat in 2 eggs.
4. Gradually add flour, mixing well after each addition until you have a thick batter that pours like soft-serve but is thicker than pancake batter.
5. Heat enough vegetable oil in a skillet to reach about half an inch at medium-high heat.
6. Form the batter into patties and fry until golden brown on both sides.
7. Remove from pan and drain on paper towel.
